holdings.infoBox: XTN is an equity ETF with a total of 45 individual holdings. The top holdings are RXO, Inc. stock at 4.57%, ArcBest at 3.86%, Avis Budget Group at 3.79%, Schneider National at 3.13%, and Landstar System at 3.09%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR S&P Transportation ETF (XTN) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Transportation Select Industry index. The fund tracks a broad-based, equal-weighted index of US stocks in the transportation industry. XTN was launched on Jan 26, 2011 and is issued by State Street.
